name: Panopto Video Platform API
what_it_does: Panopto Video Platform REST API for enterprise video management, lecture capture, and corporate training video workflow. Enables AI agents to manage video upload, processing, and publishing for enterprise video library management, handle automatic caption and transcription generation for accessibility and search automation, access video search and discovery for enterprise knowledge management, retrieve LMS integration (Canvas, Moodle, Blackboard, D2L) for educational video workflow, manage viewer analytics and engagement tracking for video performance measurement, handle folder and permission management for enterprise video access control, access live streaming and webcast management for enterprise broadcast, retrieve quiz and interaction integration for educational video engagement, manage video recording capture from desktop and lecture hall systems, and integrate Panopto video data with LMS, HRIS, and corporate learning platforms.
use_cases: Managing lecture capture from educational video agents
Automating video captioning from accessibility agents
Integrating course video from LMS agents
Tracking video engagement from L&D analytics agents
not_for: Consumer video platforms without enterprise LMS context
Marketing video platforms without lecture/training focus
Small organizations without enterprise video management needs
best_when: A university, K-12 district, or corporate L&D organization using Panopto wants AI agents to automate video ingestion, captioning, LMS integration, and corporate training video workflow.
avoid_when: FERPA LECTURE RECORDING RISK: Panopto is used extensively in higher education — lecture recordings may contain student FERPA-protected information; automated sharing of lecture videos requires FERPA compliance and student consent review. ADA/Section 508 captioning compliance — automated caption generation must meet 99%+ accuracy for Section 508 and ADA compliance; AI-generated captions with errors on automated publishing create ADA compliance exposure. COPPA for K-12 — automated video collection from students under 13 requires COPPA-compliant parental consent; K-12 Panopto deployments must implement appropriate age-appropriate data collection controls.

auth.notes: Panopto uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Documentation at support.panopto.com. Webhooks for video events. Seattle, Washington HQ. Founded 2007 by Echo360 founder. Private (Thoma Bravo-backed). 1,500+ university and corporate customers. Market leader in lecture capture and enterprise video. Competes with Kaltura, Echo360, and YuJa for academic video platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user or storage-based pricing
pricing.notes: Seattle, WA. Founded 2007. Thoma Bravo-backed. 1,500+ customers. Lecture capture market leader. Competes with Kaltura and Echo360 for academic video.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA LECTURE VIDEO: Lecture recordings in higher education may contain student identifiable information; FERPA protects student education records; automated sharing of lecture recordings outside the enrolled course section requires FERPA consent

ADA/Section 508 captioning accuracy — automated AI caption publishing must meet 99%+ accuracy standard for ADA and Section 508 compliance; lower accuracy AI captions published without human review create ADA accessibility compliance exposure

COPPA K-12 video collection — automated video collection from students under 13 in K-12 deployments requires COPPA-compliant parental consent; K-12 Panopto deployments need age verification and parental consent workflow

Video processing latency — Panopto video processing (transcoding, captioning, indexing) takes minutes to hours after upload; automated workflows dependent on processed video must poll for completion rather than assuming instant availability

LMS deep integration — Panopto LMS embedding (Canvas, Moodle, Blackboard) creates coupled access control; automated video access changes must be coordinated between Panopto and LMS role/enrollment systems
Large video storage costs — enterprise lecture capture generates significant storage; automated bulk video ingestion must account for storage tier limits and associated cost implications
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise video platform. SOC2, ISO27001, FERPA. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Educational and corporate video data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise video. SOC2, ISO27001, FERPA. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Educational video and student data.
